cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The current date is the second day of the third month of 1966. That would be March 2, 1966. The third month is March, so the current date is March 2, 1966. Now, a month ago from March 2 would be February 2, 1966. But I need to double-check that because months can have different numbers of days. February 1966 was not a leap year, right? 1966 is not divisible by 4, so February had 28 days. So, if we go back one month from March 2, 1966, it would be February 2, 1966. That makes sense because both March and February have different numbers of days, but since we're dealing with the same day of the month (2nd), it should just be February 2, 1966.
